data.name: DirectChildRuleTitle
data.value: LVGLSharp layouts should use FlowLayoutPanel row containers

data.name: DirectChildRuleMessage
data.value: Add a FlowLayoutPanel row container to the main TableLayoutPanel instead of '{0}'

data.name: DirectChildRuleDescription
data.value: LVGLSharp layouts should add one FlowLayoutPanel per main table row and place the actual controls inside that flow container.

data.name: AbsoluteRowRuleTitle
data.value: LVGLSharp layouts should use absolute table row heights

data.name: AbsoluteRowRuleMessage
data.value: Use an absolute RowStyle height instead of SizeType.Percent in LVGLSharp layouts

data.name: AbsoluteRowRuleDescription
data.value: LVGLSharp layout uses fixed row heights for the outer main TableLayoutPanel to keep LVGL controls visible.
